nasb.text: Then we asked those elders and said to them thus, ‘Who issued you a decree to rebuild this temple and to finish this structure?’

esv.text: Then we asked those elders and spoke to them thus: ‘Who gave you a decree to build this house and to finish this structure?’

cnv.text: 於是，我們就這樣問那些長老，對他們說：‘誰下令叫你們重建這殿，完成這工程呢？’

ccb.text: 我们问那些长老，‘谁批准你们重建这殿、修复这墙的？’
